com.jsyn.midi

Class MessageParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.midi.MessageParser
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    MidiSynthesizer

    public class MessageParser
extends java.lang.Object
    Parse the message and call the appropriate method to handle it.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2010 Mobileer Inc
